reviews.review_description: IM SO EXCITED FOR THE GAME MODES TO COME

I'm excited for the game modes and new hammers I hope they add more stuff like hangout where the more time you spend in that game mode the more money you make or parkour like easy is 10 medium is 100 hard is 1000 and also some thing for cube runners or a cookie clicker where you keep clicking and then more energy edit: also add trusted user. Hope this gets your attention Ethanmonke













@trav pluh

reviews.review_title: I'm not a fan of it.
reviews.review_description: To be honest, I don't like this game. It's laggy to play the game, and that's just talking about the arena map. The pvp map is basically unplayable because your hand gets stuck on the floor CONSTANTLY from how laggy it is. And it doesn't help the fact that gamemodes don't even exist yet. It's a pretty big part of the game where you get your in-game currency. But even if you have in-game currency, you can't even use it because there's four hammers that don't even use the in-game currency because 2 of the hammers you get because of a day 1 thing, and the other 2 you get by paying real money for, but I'll give you a pass on the whole putting micro transactions in not finished games. But I do see potential in this, and it would be better if it was left in the oven for a while longer, and a lot of optimization for quest 2.
So this game is pretty better than I thought I you just made I’ll definitely play the game again I made a video on the game at the end I gave it a 9.5 but I changed my mind to a 10
Theres some bugs but over all the game is Amazing keep up the great work Ethan monke!
I've been waiting awhile to play this game and I'm not disappointed

even since I’m on quest 2, I can still play the game normally.


















I kicked ethan and showed up in a video.
Honesly i didnt have high hopes when i first got it but when i played it i actually liked it, it runs pretty smoothly for the most part and i like the idea of it. pretty awesome game apes
This game is AWESOME. I love this game Because it so much fun to PVP people
